scripts.prepare: pnpm run build:rules && pnpm run build:types
scripts.predeploy: pnpm run build:rules && pnpm run rotate:actor-key
scripts.rotate:actor-key: node scripts/actor-key.mjs | wrangler secret put ACTOR_HASH_KEY || echo 'WARN: actor key rotation failed; keeping the previous key'
scripts.pretest: pnpm run build:rules && pnpm run build:types
